mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_login_log (username, ip_address, login_location, browser, os, status, message, login_time) VALUES (#{username}, #{ipAddress}, #{loginLocation}, #{browser}, #{os}, #{status}, #{message}, #{loginTime})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_login_log ll WHERE ll.deleted = 0 ORDER BY ll.login_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_login_log WHERE deleted = 0
